com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

Interface ExecuteTestCaseJob

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Job
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl

    public interface ExecuteTestCaseJob
extends Job
    Handle for testcase execution
    Since:
    TTworkbench 18

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Get the log of the campaign execution

      Returns the module name

      Returns the parameter list
      java.lang.String getTestcase()
      Returns the test case name
      TestCaseStatus getTestCaseStatus()
      Returns the test case status
